name: George McGeehan Gamer Hero
short_description: George McGeehan wants to save a cat! Play this chill platformer by jumping onto light fixtures while avoiding annoying enemies!
detailed_description:
Steam Deck Compatible since 25/march/2024!
Install game on Steam Deck then before launch
set compatibility to Proton experimental,
then change the default controller setting
to game controller with gamepad! enjoy! :D

Reach level 99 in this casual, chill game.
No dieing, no guns and no checkpoints! :P

Beat the developer's best time (25mins) to
reach level 99 by jumping from platform to
platform while avoiding mildly annoying and
randomized enemies that will make the player
fall to the bottom level!

Keyboard keys (PC Layout):
--A/Left to go Left
--D/Right to go Right
--J to Jump
--R to Restart
--M to change music
--ENTER to skip cinematic
--Spacebar to play/pause intro cinematic
--ESC to Quit

SteamDeck buttons (controller layout)
--DpadLeft/LeftjoysticktotheLeft to go Left
--DpadRight/LeftjoysticktotheRight to go Right
--A to Jump and to play/pause intro cinematic
--B to change music and to skip intro cinematic
--X to Restart
--Y to Quit

Game Launch on Steam community special!
-first person to leave a five star comment gets his/her likeness added
into the game as a cameo background character wearing a 1st t-shirt!
(Edit: congrats to TK2236 for winning, his Steam avatar likeness has been
added to the cameo roster, check him out popping in randomly in game!)

-you can have your own 2d pixelart cameo added into the game as well,
for details check out this link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kf3gztq269A
also, follow me on youtube at: CARBONTEAofficial
